items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Slips Back Below 49K; Trump Takes On Defense Firms (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index dipped in mixed trade Wednesday after surprise jobs data. Bitcoin stock Strategy jumped.

items.title: Uncertainty Interrupts Stock-Market’s New-Year Rally
items.description: Early gains eroded as new economic data and a housing proclamation from Trump shook investor sentiment.

items.title: Expanded Nvidia Partnership Underscores Caterpillar's AI Acumen
items.description: Caterpillar sells reams of generators to data centers. Now it's outfitting its machinery with AI systems made by Nvidia.

items.title: Brady Stock Is up 13% This Past Year, but Here's Why One Fund Cashed Out Completely
items.description: Brady Corporation delivers identification and workplace safety solutions to industrial and commercial clients worldwide.

items.title: How Caterpillar is positioning itself with the booming AI industry
items.description: Caterpillar CEO Joe Creed said Wednesday that the company is now positioned with the chip manufacturing giant Nvidia in the AI sector.
